text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Heh. First-rate Umamusume must also be skilled
at gauging their opponent's strength.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: First place in this race is definitely going to that Umamusume, number three...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
What a finish! But it's too close to call! Was it
number one or number three?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Number three, as I said. Now back to
traini—

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The results are in! First place goes to number one!
The front runner managed to keep her lead the
whole race!

text_block_list.name: Shrewd Tipster
text_block_list.text:
Heheh, right on the money again! If you want
first-rate predictions, look no further than yours
truly!

text_block_list.name: Tipster's Friend
text_block_list.text:
That's so amazing! You always know who's going
to come in first!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hmph, that was merely a coincidence. My
predictions are certainly more first-rate than—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I won't give up until I win!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo is so absorbed in predicting races that
she's forgotten about training...
